name: Ping An Da Hua Fund Management Co - Pingan-UOB Traded MMK Fund
summary: Ping An Da Hua Fund Management Co - Pingan-UOB Traded MMK Fund is a money market fund managed by Ping An Da Hua Fund Management Co. in partnership with UOB. It invests in short-term, low-risk money market instruments and is designed to be easily traded. The fund is based in China.
